# Drifella 2 NPC Bark Pool

Source: `drifella2-phrases-tagged.jsonl` (1023 unique phrases).
Filter: `bark_score >= 5`, cursed excluded.
Usable bark candidates: **130**. Cursed (gated): 6.

Lines are unedited from the Drifella 2 trait metadata. Drop into NPC mouths verbatim — typos, weird caps, broken grammar are part of the texture.

## Index
- [By voice](#by-voice)
- [By vibe](#by-vibe)
- [Top 50 punchlines](#top-50-punchlines)
- [Suggested per-NPC starter sets](#suggested-per-npc-starter-sets)
- [Cursed gate](#cursed-gate)

## Cursed gate

6 phrases flagged as cursed (slurs / hard-edge content). Stored in `drifella2-cursed-pool.json` for offline reference only — **do not ship to a public build**.

- `trader retard`
- `lego nazi zombies`
- `based retard gang`
- `BORED APE NAZI CLUB`
- `retard absorber`
- `youre a fag and your shits all retarded`
